messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this parent section of a document.
Use the child summaries below. Mention the topics, entities, dates, tables,
figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types covered
when they are visible. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Parent:
{
  "node_id": "0011",
  "title": "02 海外移动游戏市场现状分析",
  "page_index": 15,
  "page_range": "15"
}

Child summaries:
[
  {
    "node_id": "0012",
    "title": "海外移动游戏市场收入规模&下载量",
    "page_range": "15-16",
    "summary": "**可回答主题**：海外移动游戏市场收入增长趋势、双平台（iOS/Android）下载量份额迁移、高价值用户生态分布变化、游戏厂商用户获取与商店优化策略。\n**核心实体**：海外移动游戏市场（不含中国大陆）、App Store、Google Play、点点数据、游戏厂商/发行商。\n**时间范围**：2022年–2025年（核心数据观测期）；2026年（报告版权年份及数据可能调整提示）。\n**定义与统计口径**：\n- 地域范围：除中国大陆以外的所有地区。\n- 渠道范围：仅限App Store与Google Play上架产品，不含其他第三方渠道或平台。\n- 收入定义：仅统计用户直接消费总金额，明确排除广告变现、第三方充值等其他收入模式。该口径统一适用于本报告后续所有“海外收入”相关统计。\n**核心主张与策略洞察**：\n- 市场收入增长持续平缓，年增速稳定在1%–2%区间。\n- 下载量份额发生结构性迁移：Google Play占比由2022年85%收缩至2025年74%，App Store由15%攀升至26%，表明高价值用户与核心市场注意力正加速向iOS生态集中。\n- 迁移归因：隐私政策变化、用户设备升级、平台营销能力等多因素综合作用。\n- 厂商策略建议：需大幅提升App Store产品页面优化（ASO）、本地化展示及争取编辑推荐的业务权重，在部分区域应将其提升至与买量投放同等的战略高度。\n**关键指标与数据**：\n- 收入规模（亿元）：提供2022–2025年逐年数值，2025年整体市场增长率维持在1%–2%。\n- 下载量（亿次）：提供2022–2025年逐年数值，整体市场年增长率分别为-6.21%（2023）、1.44%（2024）、5.42%（2025）。\n- 平台份额对比：明确标注2022年与2025年Google Play与App Store的下载量占比（85%/15% → 74%/26%）。\n**图表与可视化**：包含两张核心数据图表：①《2022-2025年海外移动游戏市场收入规模》（分平台数据与整体增长率）；②《2022-2025年海外移动游戏市场下载量》（分平台数据与整体增长率）。\n**证据类型与来源**：定量数据综合自点点数据统计模型、上市企业财报及行业专家访谈；附注声明部分数据可能在点点数据2026年后续报告中修正。无明确操作流程（Procedures），但包含明确的业务策略指导。"
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0013",
    "title": "海外移动游戏收入TOP榜",
    "page_range": "16-17",
    "summary": "This section (pp. 16–17) analyzes the overseas mobile game revenue TOP rankings, focusing on legacy title revitalization and 2025 new release market performance. **Topics:** Mobile game market analysis, legacy game revitalization strategies, new product market entry, gameplay & monetization design, user acquisition (UA) marketing, IP utilization vs. original creation, commercial framework reuse, and long-term operational dynamics. **Entities:** Supercell, 点点互动 (DianDian Interactive), 万代南梦宫, 海彼游戏, 网石游戏, NEXON, CyGames, FunPlus, and data provider 点点数据. Featured titles include 《皇室战争》(Clash Royale), 《奔奔王国》(Kingshot), 《荒野乱斗》, 《Whiteout Survival》, and the top 16 revenue-generating new releases of 2025 (e.g., 《SD钢弹 G世代 永恒》《弓箭传说2》《七骑士 Re:BIRTH》《枫之谷：放置冒险记》). **Dates:** 2023–2025 (annual revenue tracking), March–December 2025 (monthly tracking), 2024 (baseline comparison), and 2026 (report copyright). **Tables & Figures:** Chart 1 (2023–2025 overseas revenue scale for Clash Royale in 亿元), Chart 2 (2025 monthly overseas revenue for Kingshot in 亿元, highlighting a 94.8% metric), and a ranked table of the top 16 overseas mobile game new releases for 2025 (detailing rank, title, annual revenue, and publisher). **Definitions/Concepts:** “系统性重生” (systematic rebirth via gameplay/economy overhaul), “合成奇兵” (auto-chess synthesis mode), “模拟经营+4X SLG” (validated core framework), “副玩法买量” (saturated secondary-gameplay UA strategy), and “塔防” (tower defense for low-barrier onboarding). **Procedures/Strategies:** Clash Royale’s revival tactics include increasing trophy road limits, introducing high-tier progression modes, launching auto-chess synthesis, and decentralizing premium rewards to mid-tier players. Kingshot’s launch strategy adapts a Sim+4X SLG framework, integrates lightweight tower de..."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0016",
    "title": "海外移动游戏市场新品收入占比",
    "page_range": "19-20",
    "summary": "本章节可支持以下维度的检索问答：\n- **核心主题**：海外移动游戏市场新品收入占比变化趋势、市场成熟度特征、厂商新品策略与资源配置建议。\n- **关键主张/结论**：海外新品收入占比呈下降态势但降幅较缓，源于新品生态位相对稳固；剔除《MONOPOLY GO!》等超级爆款后，2023-2025年TOP新品收入曲线高度重合，表明市场已进入“基数稳固、尖峰难现”的成熟阶段；超级爆款属小概率“黑天鹅”事件，厂商需务实校准预期，瞄准特定生态位进行产品设计与资源配置，追求健康投资回报率而非盲目追求规模。\n- **关键指标与时间**：统计周期为2023-2025年。2024年新品收入占比12.0%（老游戏88.1%），2025年占比10.8%（老游戏89.2%）。图表追踪TOP1-TOP10新品收入分布。\n- **涉及实体/案例**：数据来源为点点数据。代表游戏包括《MONOPOLY GO!》（2023年超级爆款）、SD钢弹 G世代 永恒、弓箭传说2、奔奔王国（2025年代表）、菇勇者传说、剑与远征：启程、宝可梦TCG Pocket（2024年代表）。\n- **图表信息**：折线图对比2023、2024、2025年TOP1-TOP10新品收入规模分布曲线，并包含“2023年剔除TOP1超级爆款后”的对照曲线。\n- **证据类型**：点点数据自主研究数据、跨年度趋势对比分析、典型产品案例佐证。"
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0017",
    "title": "海外各地区移动游戏收入占比分布",
    "page_range": "20-21",
    "summary": "**Topics:** Overseas mobile game market revenue distribution across the United States, Japan, South Korea, and Hong Kong/Macau/Taiwan (HKMT); regional market scale and year-over-year growth trends (2021–2025); revenue concentration dynamics by product/publisher tiers; 2025 top-grossing and new-release game rankings; impact of macroeconomic conditions, regulatory policies, and platform ecosystem changes on player consumption and publisher strategy.\n**Entities:** Regional markets (US, Japan, South Korea, HKMT); top-grossing games (e.g., MONOPOLY GO!, Royal Match, 怪物弹珠, Fate/Grand Order, 天堂M, 星城Online, 崩坏：星穹铁道); publishers/developers (e.g., NEXON, Netmarble, 点点互动, First Fun, miHoYo, Scopely, King); platforms & regulators (Apple AppStore, Google Play, Japan’s Smartphone Specific Software Competition Promotion Act); data source (DianDian Data/点点数据).\n**Dates:** 2021–2025 (historical and current market data period); 2025 (primary analysis and ranking year); specific policy timelines (2025 Apple third-party payment court ruling, December 18, 2015 effective date for Japan’s competition law); 2026 (report copyright).\n**Figures:** Time-series line/bar charts depicting regional annual market revenue (in 100M RMB/亿元) and YoY growth rates (2021–2025); stacked bar charts illustrating revenue concentration breakdowns by rank tiers (Top 1–10, 11–50, 51–200, Others) for 2023–2025.\n**Tables:** Structured ranked lists for each region’s 2025 Overall Revenue TOP 10 and New Release Revenue TOP 10, containing columns for rank, game name, publisher, annual revenue (亿元), YoY growth rate, overall market rank, and launch month.\n**Definitions:** \"Safe consumption\" defined as player preference for socially established, low-risk top-tier products during economic uncertainty; platform compliance requ..."
  }
]

message.content:
**Topics:** Overseas mobile game market revenue & download trends, platform ecosystem shifts (iOS vs. Android), legacy title revitalization, 2025 new release performance, new product revenue share dynamics, regional market distribution (US, Japan, South Korea, HKMT), market maturity indicators, and publisher UA/ASO/resource allocation strategies.

**Entities:** Markets/Regions: Overseas (excl. mainland China), US, Japan, South Korea, HKMT. Platforms/Regulators: App Store, Google Play, Japan’s Smartphone Specific Software Competition Promotion Act, Apple third-party payment rulings. Publishers/Developers: Supercell, 点点互动 (DianDian Interactive), 万代南梦宫, 海彼游戏, 网石游戏, NEXON, CyGames, FunPlus, First Fun, miHoYo, Scopely, King. Data Source: 点点数据 (DianDian Data). Key Titles: Clash Royale, Kingshot, Whiteout Survival, MONOPOLY GO!, Royal Match, Monster Strike, FGO, Lineage M, Honkai: Star Rail, SD Gundam G世代 永恒, Archero 2, Pokémon TCG Pocket, etc.

**Dates:** Core analysis period: 2021–2025 (with specific focus on 2022–2025 for downloads/revenue, 2023–2025 for new releases, and 2025 for regional rankings). Policy/Report dates: Dec 18, 2015 (Japan law), 2025 (Apple ruling, primary ranking year), 2026 (report copyright & data adjustment note).

**Definitions & Concepts:** 
- *Market Scope:* Excludes mainland China; covers only App Store & Google Play.
- *Revenue Definition:* Direct user spending only; explicitly excludes ad monetization & third-party top-ups.
- *Strategic Concepts:* “系统性重生” (systematic rebirth via gameplay/economy overhaul), “模拟经营+4X SLG” (validated core framework), “副玩法买量” (secondary gameplay UA), “Safe consumption” (player shift to established low-risk titles during economic uncertainty).

**Claims & Strategic Procedures:** 
- Market revenue growth is flat (1%–2% YoY), while download share structurally shifts toward iOS (App Store: 15%→26%, Google Play: 85%→74% from 2022–2025), driven by privacy changes, device upgrades, and platform marketing.
- Publishers must elevate iOS ASO, localization, and editorial features to strategic parity with paid UA.
- Legacy titles can be revitalized via progression limit increases, new modes (e.g., auto-chess synthesis), and premium reward decentralization to mid-tier players.
- New product revenue share is declining (12.0% in 2024 → 10.8% in 2025); excluding mega-hits, TOP new release curves overlap heavily, indicating a mature market where publishers should target specific niches for healthy ROI rather than chasing scale.
- Regional markets show tiered revenue concentration, with macroeconomic and regulatory factors influencing "safe consumption" behaviors and platform compliance requirements.

**Key Metrics:** 
- Revenue growth: 1%–2% annually (2022–2025).
- Download YoY: -6.21% (2023), 1.44% (2024), 5.42% (2025).
- New product revenue share: 12.0% (2024), 10.8% (2025).
- Platform download share: GP 85%/AS 15% (2022) → GP 74%/AS 26% (2025).
- Regional & title-specific revenue tracked in 亿元 (100M RMB).

**Tables & Figures:** 
- Charts: 2022–2025 revenue & download scale (split by platform); Clash Royale 2023–2025 revenue; Kingshot 2025 monthly revenue (highlighting 94.8% metric); 2023–2025 TOP1–10 new release revenue curves (with/without mega-hit); 2021–2025 regional annual revenue & YoY growth line/bar charts; 2023–2025 revenue concentration stacked bars (Top 1–10, 11–50, 51–200, Others).
- Tables: 2025 Top 16 new releases (rank, title, revenue, publisher); Regional 2025 Overall & New Release TOP 10 lists (rank, name, publisher, revenue, YoY, overall rank, launch month).

**Evidence Types:** Quantitative data from 点点数据 statistical models, cross-year trend comparisons, public financial reports, industry expert interviews, policy/regulatory analysis, and case studies of specific title lifecycles and regional market behaviors. Data notes indicate potential adjustments in 2026 follow-up reports.

    - **Input Child Summaries:** Four child summaries (nodes 0012, 0013, 0016, 0017) covering different aspects of the overseas mobile game market.

        - Do not invent facts.

        - Retrieval-oriented (structured, clear, keyword-rich, suitable for Q&A/search).

2.  **Deconstruct Child Summaries & Extract Key Elements:**
    *Child 0012 (0012: 海外移动游戏市场收入规模&下载量)*
    - Topics: Revenue growth trends, download share migration (iOS/Android), high-value user ecosystem, UA/ASO strategies.
    - Entities: Overseas mobile game market (excl. mainland China), App Store, Google Play, 点点数据 (DianDian Data), game publishers.
    - Dates: 2022–2025 (core data), 2026 (copyright/adjustment note).
    - Definitions: Region = excl. mainland China; Channels = App Store & Google Play only; Revenue = direct user spending only (excludes ads, 3rd-party top-ups).
    - Claims/Strategies: Revenue growth flat (1-2% YoY); Download share shifted from GP 85%/AS 15% (2022) to GP 74%/AS 26% (2025) due to privacy, device upgrades, marketing; Publishers must prioritize ASO/localization/featured spots on iOS.
    - Metrics: Revenue (亿元) 2022-2025; Downloads (亿次) with YoY: -6.21% (2023), 1.44% (2024), 5.42% (2025).
    - Figures: 2 charts (Revenue scale 2022-2025, Download volume 2022-2025).
    - Evidence: Quantitative data from DianDian models, public financial reports, expert interviews.

    *Child 0013 (0013: 海外移动游戏收入TOP榜)*
    - Topics: Legacy title revitalization, 2025 new release performance, gameplay/monetization design, UA, IP vs original, commercial framework reuse.
    - Entities: Supercell, 点点互动, 万代南梦宫, 海彼游戏, 网石游戏, NEXON, CyGames, FunPlus, 点点数据. Games: Clash Royale, Kingshot, Brawl Stars, Whiteout Survival, SD Gundam, Archero 2, Seven Knights Re:BIRTH, MapleStory M, etc.
    - Dates: 2023–2025, Mar-Dec 2025, 2024 baseline, 2026 copyright.

    - Definitions/Concepts: “系统性重生” (systematic rebirth), “合成奇兵” (auto-chess synthesis), “模拟经营+4X SLG”, “副玩法买量” (secondary gameplay UA), “塔防” (tower defense).
    - Procedures/Strategies: Clash Royale revival (trophy limits, high-tier modes, auto-chess, reward decentralization); Kingshot launch (Sim+4X SLG framework, lightweight tower defense).
    - Evidence: Revenue tracking, case studies.

    *Child 0016 (0016: 海外移动游戏市场新品收入占比)*
    - Topics: New product revenue share trends, market maturity, publisher strategy/resource allocation.
    - Claims: New product share declining slowly but steadily; excluding mega-hits (e.g., MONOPOLY GO!), 2023-2025 TOP new release curves overlap heavily, indicating a mature market ("stable base, hard to peak"); mega-hits are rare "black swan" events; publishers should target specific niches for healthy ROI.
    - Metrics/Dates: 2023-2025. 2024 new share: 12.0% (old: 88.1%); 2025 new share: 10.8% (old: 89.2%). Tracks TOP1-TOP10 new releases.
    - Entities/Cases: 点点数据, MONOPOLY GO! (2023), SD Gundam, Archero 2, Kingshot (2025), Mushroom Legend, AFK Journey, Pokémon TCG Pocket (2024).
    - Figures: Line chart comparing 2023-2025 TOP1-10 new release revenue curves, plus a 2023 curve excluding TOP1.
    - Evidence: DianDian proprietary data, cross-year trend analysis, case studies.

    *Child 0017 (0017: 海外各地区移动游戏收入占比分布)*
    - Topics: Regional revenue distribution (US, Japan, South Korea, HKMT), market scale & YoY growth (2021-2025), revenue concentration by tiers, 2025 top-grossing/new release rankings, macroeconomic/regulatory/platform impacts.
    - Entities: US, Japan, South Korea, HKMT; Games: MONOPOLY GO!, Royal Match, Monster Strike, FGO, Lineage M, Star City Online, Honkai: Star Rail; Publishers: NEXON, Netmarble, 点点互动, First Fun, miHoYo, Scopely, King; Platforms/Regulators: App Store, Google Play, Japan’s Smartphone Specific Software Competition Promotion Act; 点点数据.
    - Dates: 2021–2025, 2025 primary, policy timelines (2025 Apple 3rd-party payment ruling, Dec 18, 2015 Japan law), 2026 copyright.
    - Figures: Time-series line/bar charts (regional annual revenue in 亿元 & YoY growth 2021-2025); Stacked bar charts (revenue concentration by rank tiers: Top 1-10, 11-50, 51-200, Others for 2023-2025).
    - Tables: Ranked lists per region for 2025 Overall TOP 10 & New Release TOP 10 (rank, name, publisher, revenue, YoY, overall rank, launch month).
    - Definitions: "Safe consumption" (preference for established low-risk products during economic uncertainty); platform compliance requirements.
    - Evidence: Regional market data, policy analysis, tiered revenue breakdowns.

3.  **Synthesize & Structure for Retrieval-Oriented Summary:**

I will organize it by logical categories (Topics, Entities, Dates, Definitions, Claims/Strategies, Metrics, Tables/Figures, Evidence) as requested, ensuring all visible elements from the children are included without inventing facts.

response_text:
**Topics:** Overseas mobile game market revenue & download trends, platform ecosystem shifts (iOS vs. Android), legacy title revitalization, 2025 new release performance, new product revenue share dynamics, regional market distribution (US, Japan, South Korea, HKMT), market maturity indicators, and publisher UA/ASO/resource allocation strategies.

**Entities:** Markets/Regions: Overseas (excl. mainland China), US, Japan, South Korea, HKMT. Platforms/Regulators: App Store, Google Play, Japan’s Smartphone Specific Software Competition Promotion Act, Apple third-party payment rulings. Publishers/Developers: Supercell, 点点互动 (DianDian Interactive), 万代南梦宫, 海彼游戏, 网石游戏, NEXON, CyGames, FunPlus, First Fun, miHoYo, Scopely, King. Data Source: 点点数据 (DianDian Data). Key Titles: Clash Royale, Kingshot, Whiteout Survival, MONOPOLY GO!, Royal Match, Monster Strike, FGO, Lineage M, Honkai: Star Rail, SD Gundam G世代 永恒, Archero 2, Pokémon TCG Pocket, etc.

**Dates:** Core analysis period: 2021–2025 (with specific focus on 2022–2025 for downloads/revenue, 2023–2025 for new releases, and 2025 for regional rankings). Policy/Report dates: Dec 18, 2015 (Japan law), 2025 (Apple ruling, primary ranking year), 2026 (report copyright & data adjustment note).

**Definitions & Concepts:** 
- *Market Scope:* Excludes mainland China; covers only App Store & Google Play.
- *Revenue Definition:* Direct user spending only; explicitly excludes ad monetization & third-party top-ups.
- *Strategic Concepts:* “系统性重生” (systematic rebirth via gameplay/economy overhaul), “模拟经营+4X SLG” (validated core framework), “副玩法买量” (secondary gameplay UA), “Safe consumption” (player shift to established low-risk titles during economic uncertainty).

**Claims & Strategic Procedures:** 
- Market revenue growth is flat (1%–2% YoY), while download share structurally shifts toward iOS (App Store: 15%→26%, Google Play: 85%→74% from 2022–2025), driven by privacy changes, device upgrades, and platform marketing.
- Publishers must elevate iOS ASO, localization, and editorial features to strategic parity with paid UA.
- Legacy titles can be revitalized via progression limit increases, new modes (e.g., auto-chess synthesis), and premium reward decentralization to mid-tier players.
- New product revenue share is declining (12.0% in 2024 → 10.8% in 2025); excluding mega-hits, TOP new release curves overlap heavily, indicating a mature market where publishers should target specific niches for healthy ROI rather than chasing scale.
- Regional markets show tiered revenue concentration, with macroeconomic and regulatory factors influencing "safe consumption" behaviors and platform compliance requirements.

**Key Metrics:** 
- Revenue growth: 1%–2% annually (2022–2025).
- Download YoY: -6.21% (2023), 1.44% (2024), 5.42% (2025).
- New product revenue share: 12.0% (2024), 10.8% (2025).
- Platform download share: GP 85%/AS 15% (2022) → GP 74%/AS 26% (2025).
- Regional & title-specific revenue tracked in 亿元 (100M RMB).

**Tables & Figures:** 
- Charts: 2022–2025 revenue & download scale (split by platform); Clash Royale 2023–2025 revenue; Kingshot 2025 monthly revenue (highlighting 94.8% metric); 2023–2025 TOP1–10 new release revenue curves (with/without mega-hit); 2021–2025 regional annual revenue & YoY growth line/bar charts; 2023–2025 revenue concentration stacked bars (Top 1–10, 11–50, 51–200, Others).
- Tables: 2025 Top 16 new releases (rank, title, revenue, publisher); Regional 2025 Overall & New Release TOP 10 lists (rank, name, publisher, revenue, YoY, overall rank, launch month).

**Evidence Types:** Quantitative data from 点点数据 statistical models, cross-year trend comparisons, public financial reports, industry expert interviews, policy/regulatory analysis, and case studies of specific title lifecycles and regional market behaviors. Data notes indicate potential adjustments in 2026 follow-up reports.
